title: Kingdom of Heaven
tmdbOverview: After his wife dies, a blacksmith named Balian is thrust into royalty, political intrigue and bloody holy wars during the Crusades.
synopsis: Kingdom of Heaven (2005) is a drama, action and adventure film from Spain and United Kingdom. It holds a solid 7.3 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2000s and genre rankings. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
